DatasetLicenseEntry.description:
Per-dataset license entry for aggregated sources.

Captures the license, DOI, and spectrum count for one contributing
dataset within a source library. Used to break down the umbrella license
of aggregated sources (notably ECOSIS) into the actual mix of licenses
that the contributing datasets carry.

id.description: Identifier of the contributing dataset within the source.
id.title: Id

title.description: Human-readable title of the contributing dataset.
title.title: Title

url.description: URL to the dataset's landing page.
url.title: Url

license_url.description: URL to the full license text, if available.
license_url.title: License Url

citation_doi.description: DOI for the citation, if available.
citation_doi.title: Citation Doi

spectrum_count.description: Number of spectra from this dataset.
spectrum_count.title: Spectrum Count

DatasetLicenseEntry.title: DatasetLicenseEntry

LicenseEntry.description: Licensing and citation information for a single source library.

name.description: Full name of the source library.
name.title: Name

url.description: DOI or URL for the source library.
url.title: Url

license_url.description: URL to the full license text, if available.
license_url.title: License Url

citation_doi.description: DOI for the citation, if available.
citation_doi.title: Citation Doi

datasets.description: Per-dataset breakdown for aggregated sources (ECOSIS, OSSL), keyed by dataset id. ``None`` for monolithic sources.
datasets.title: Datasets

LicenseEntry.title: LicenseEntry

description:
Top-level structure of the licenses.json file.

Provides a standalone index of licensing and citation information for
each source library, keyed by the same source identifiers used in the
catalog and Parquet files (e.g. ``usgs_splib07``, ``ecostress``).

generated_at.description: Timestamp when the file was generated.
generated_at.title: Generated At

notice.description: Important notice that licensing terms differ between source libraries and users must check the terms for each source they use.
notice.title: Notice

sources.description: Licensing and citation info keyed by source library identifier.
sources.title: Sources

title: LicensesFile
